sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (ஆண்பால்)
1. a pale or stake, a palisade

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From “charasso” (to sharpen to a point; akin to G1125 through the idea of scratching); a stake, that is, (by implication) a palisade or rampart (millitary mound for circumvallation in a siege): - trench.
